title: IMMZD18SRotavirus ValueSet for Decision Table Schema
description: JSON Schema for IMMZD18SRotavirus ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

enum: First rotavirus dose from the primary series was administered-118
Second rotavirus dose from the primary series was administered-118
For a series containing more than two doses, two rotavirus primary series doses of mixed series or a series with unknown vaccine products were administered-324
Third rotavirus dose from the primary series was administered-118

narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the IMMZD18SRotavirus ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/immunizations/ValueSet-IMMZD18SRotavirusVS.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
